actionButton.selectAttackerForBlocker: Select the attacker this blocker should defend against
actionButton.resolveTooltip: Pass priority so the top stack item can resolve if every player also passes. Shortcut: Space.
actionButton.resolveAllTooltip: Keep passing priority while the stack resolves. A required choice or stop can interrupt it.
actionButton.priorityTooltip: Pass priority. If the stack is empty, this advances through the current priority window. Shortcut: Space.
actionButton.passToEndTooltip: Auto-pass until the end step unless a choice, stop, or Full Control interrupts. Shortcut: Enter.

board.clickOpponent: Click an opponent to view their board

permanent.copyTooltip: Token copy of a real card

fullControl.tooltip: Hold priority windows instead of letting quiet spots auto-pass. Shortcut: F.

phaseStop.upkeepDescription: Upkeep triggers and recurring costs happen here.
phaseStop.preCombatMainDescription: Play lands and cast spells before combat.
phaseStop.beginCombatDescription: Last priority window before attackers are chosen.
phaseStop.combatDamageDescription: Creatures assign and deal combat damage.
phaseStop.endCombatDescription: Last combat priority window after damage.
phaseStop.postCombatMainDescription: Play lands or cast spells after combat.
phaseStop.endDescription: End-step triggers and end-of-turn actions happen here.
phaseStop.cleanupDescription: Damage wears off and maximum hand size is checked.
phaseStop.tooltipStopSet: Stop set: click to remove this auto-pass stop.
phaseStop.tooltipNoStop: No stop set: click to pause auto-pass here.

kickDialog.title: Kick {{name}}?

badges.monarchTooltip: The Monarch — draws an extra card at end of turn
badges.initiativeTooltip: Has the Initiative — ventures into Undercity at start of upkeep
badges.cityBlessingTooltip: City's Blessing — controls ten or more permanents (Ascend)
badges.ringLevel1: 1. Ring-bearer is legendary and can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.
badges.ringLevel2: 2. When it attacks, draw a card, then discard a card.
badges.ringLevel3: 3. When it becomes blocked by a creature, that creature's controller sacrifices it at end of combat.
badges.ringLevel4: 4. When it deals combat damage to a player, each opponent loses 3 life.

coverage.title: Card Coverage
coverage.subtitle: Inspect implementation coverage and supported engine handlers.
coverage.generateHint: Generate it with: cargo run --bin coverage-report -- /path/to/cards --all > client/public/coverage-data.json

coverage.selectCardPrompt: Select a card to inspect its parse breakdown
coverage.navHint: Use arrow keys to navigate, Escape to deselect

coverage.setMembershipMissing: Set membership data is not in this coverage export.
coverage.noUnsupportedInSet: No unsupported cards in this set.

coverage.threeGapBundles: 3-Gap Bundles (implement all three to unlock cards)

coverage.noHandlersInCategory: No handlers in this category are produced by the parser on fully supported cards.
coverage.footerSummary: {{handlers}} handlers across {{categories}} categories · engine-derived from {{cards}} supported cards

alternativeCost.blitzSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally, or pay its Blitz cost — it gains haste and "when it dies, draw a card", but is sacrificed at the beginning of the next end step.

alternativeCost.evokeSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally or cast it for its Evoke cost.
alternativeCost.overloadSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally targeting a single permanent, or pay its Overload cost to affect all valid targets.
alternativeCost.bestowSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally as a creature, or pay its Bestow cost to cast it as an Aura.
alternativeCost.awakenSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally, or pay its Awaken cost to also put +1/+1 counters on a land you control and turn it into a 0/0 Elemental creature with haste.
alternativeCost.cleaveSubtitle: Cast {{name}} normally, or pay its Cleave cost to remove the bracketed text.

engineLost.crashBody: phase.rs hit an internal error and can’t safely continue this action. Your last saved turn is preserved — reload to restore the game. Please report this so we can fix it.
engineLost.connectionBody: phase.rs lost its link to the game engine — most often caused by a background update activating mid-game. Your last saved turn is preserved; reload to restore the game.
engineLost.reportWhatHappened:
**What happened**
_briefly describe what you were doing_

**Diagnostic**
```
{{diagnostic}}
```

mutateMerge.bottomDesc: The merged creature keeps the target creature's name, types, and power/toughness.
